Notice Of Motion And Motion To Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: 9:44am There is no appearance at the first calling of the case. The Court passes the matter.
10:49am The matter is recalled.

Appearances (by Zoom):
Muhammad Khan (BF7156, Soledad Correctional Facility) Plaintiff in Pro Per
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court announces the tentative ruling. Mr. Khan orally requests to transfer venue. The Court indicates the opposing side is not present and therefore has no jurisdiction over the matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MUHAMMAD KHAN'S Motion To Leave To File Second Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff Muhammad Khan's Motion To Leave To File Second Amended Complaint, for which no opposition was received, is granted and the court is ordered to file the Second Amended Complaint (SAC), which is attached to the motion. Plaintiff is responsible for service of the SAC.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats the Court's ruling verbatim.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
